boundary.title: Key rotation policy governance T2 boundary

features.description: Rotation events record actor, reason, old and new key identifiers, policy version, authorization decision, JWKS publication result, and retirement result.
features.title: Key rotation admin audit evidence

features.description: Admin, CLI, RPC, and UIX rotation actions reference the effective policy id and immutable policy version used for execution.
features.title: Key rotation admin policy-bound execution

features.description: Administration-plane view of effective key rotation policy and policy version metadata without owning or mutating policy truth.
features.title: Key rotation admin policy view

features.description: Tests and gates prove authorization does not define rotation policy, administration does not persist governance policy truth, and runtime consumes only published effective policy.
features.title: Key rotation cross-plane nonoverlap guard

features.description: Governance publishes one effective key rotation policy projection consumed read-only by administration and runtime key and JWKS operations.
features.title: Key rotation policy effective publication

features.description: Rotation workflows fail closed when a governed key class requires policy and no published effective key rotation policy exists.
features.title: Key rotation policy fail-closed enforcement

features.description: Governance-plane policy record for rotation cadence, scope, key class, key use, algorithm applicability, emergency triggers, overlap windows, retirement windows, and JWKS publication rules.
features.title: Key rotation policy governance record

features.description: Immutable governance lifecycle for key rotation policy versions, approval state, supersession, rollback, and published effective-policy projection.
features.title: Key rotation policy version lifecycle
